# Store

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Store;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Store { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
shop, supermarket, stand, boutique, building

## Categories
buildings, navigation, shopping

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/store)
